CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Re: Default Prove-Up Hearing; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling

(Amended) Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Kay Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the plaintiff Bosco Credit LLC.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Ken F. K. Wong aka King Wong as follows:

Damages/Principal - $194435.00
Prejudgment Interest - $26818.00
Attorney's Fees - $410.00
Costs - $460.00 and Late Fee - $270.00
Total in the amount of $222,393.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
